reviews.review_description: I first did the Escape room free, and I really enjoyed this.  Then I purchased the Room Escape.  I really enjoyed the graphics and puzzles, however I was disappointed it was over so quickly.  I would enjoy searching for additional rooms,  solving puzzles, even the grounds of the Victorian house.  I just wish there were additional levels and extra jump scares.

I did the Escape Free and it was fun. I purchased the game. It kept freezing on me after being in the room. Also, if you leave and return to finish the game, it sorta of making you start over. 

I’m pretty disappointed with the game. Don’t waste your time and money on this game.

reviews.review_title: Great puzzle game, ended too soon
reviews.review_description: This game has great graphics and the puzzles were fun and took time to figure out. I was really enjoying the game, there is a great mystery story to figure out, but it seems that the creators didnt know how to do more puzzles or wasnt sure how to build the story line further and after you beat 3 rooms and a hallway, it gives a quick super generic ending, which was extremely disappointing,  as I figure it would be a game that continued on and you figure out the mystery. I wasnt sure it ended,  bc it was so generic, but that was it! I was glad it was on sale when I bought it. Super disappointed that such a great game literally led to a dead end too early. 😞

I tried the demo which is promising. Buying the game allows you only 2 additional rooms, at most 1 hour of game. The background noise is on a loop. And all noises are played twice. This is highly disappointing and not worth the amount paid.

The first level is free. It's kinda fun, kinda challenging. After you beat it they offer you the "FULL GAME" for $9.99. But the "FULL GAME" is only 2 more levels. I have never felt so utterly stolen from by a Meta game. Plus the whole time your playing there's a glitch that makes it sound like you're walking when you aren't. Immensely annoying. It doesn't happen when you first sign in but after about 5 minutes it just doesn't go away. Even if you log out and back in 5 minutes later it's doing it again.

It was fun, challenging puzzles but $9.99 for a total of 3 rooms is ridiculous.   I hope they add more rooms but judging by most other VR games like this, that won't be happening.  I could be wrong and I hope I am but I have my doubts.  VERY Disappointed
I bought it but still can't play anything but the 1st level
The footstep glitch is overwhelming. I had high hopes because i liked the demo but now I want a refund.

i bought the 2 other rooms, but i can't use its, because its are closed. I have invoice about bying...
but the first room likes me very.

reviews.review_title: Not long enough for the money
reviews.review_description: I started with the free trial and it was very interesting. After 15 minutes the trial ended then gave the option to buy game. Finished the first level then made it to the second. Passed that then got to third. Once I passed the third the game was over.

Some very annoying bugs. The height kept changing around and I would have to fully exit the game and come back to reset it properly each room. Some basic functionality didn't work. And the worst was the sound glitch. Your footsteps would echo endlessly with each step on top of each other until it was just a horrible buzz sound throughout. I muted my headset, but then some puzzles required hearing things and it was a mess. 
The story was interesting, but half baked and didn't ever really go anywhere. When you solve the last room it just kind of... Ends. 

If you can get this on sale for a couple bucks, cool. Otherwise, not worth it. There are way better puzzle games out there.

game glitched the whole time, only 2 levels after the first free level.  sound issues that were annoying i had to turn off the volume, and now i have a head ache.  controlling movements was also annoying.  a big waste of time and money. 🤬🤬🤬😡

Fair waring, there's only 3 "rooms" AND there's a super annoying foot steps glitch. You will hear your footsteps constantly, even when standing still.  So $3 feels like a fair price because the puzzles are fun and a little challenging , but the game is so glitchy anything more than a few bucks for 1 hours of game play is a crime. This is a swing and a miss.
We pay only for 2 more rooms. I feel betrayed.

reviews.review_title: Finished the game in less than one hour
reviews.review_description: My baf for not reading the reviews. Anyways is a rip off.

Issues with sound (as others have mentioned).
Works better in sitting mode than roaming.
Solve puzzle in wrong order and it doesn't complete and no way to fix without redoing the room.
Good idea and decent implementation but it feels like a beta version.  Especially after paying for it.
It was good but you can get better escape games for free. Should have more rooms for the price!! Sorry guys to give a bad review but maybe update it or have add-ons.

I tried the free first chapter and enjoyed it so purchased the full game. I found the game quite glitch, such as, when moving to the 2nd chapter I found myself beneath the bedroom, my footsteps kept sound even when standing still and game freeze where I had to restart several times. Then I was disappoint when the game ended after chapter 3. So in total between an hour to an hour and a half of game play. I didn't think it was worth the mkney and I purchased on sale.
Its only 3 rooms. Its a good beginner escape room game but I ran into a ton of glitches making gameplay difficult
The game on the whole is a quaint little game, but disappointed it was only three levels, I realise people work to a budget but three levels was very disappointing 🙁

This feels very much like a test…a game in beta testing out certain puzzle ideas. 
The story is extremely basic and not overly gripping. It’s also only 3 rooms. Granted the puzzles are well thought out and encourage you to carefully look at things. 
There are many glitches - second room the footsteps just wouldn’t stop. 

It’s an ok mini game but it’s not on par with the room or da vinci
You get the first chapter free then you have to pay £7.99 for just another 2 chapters absolute con. Total waste of money.
I hope they make another level in the future.
Completed three levels, got the key to the next room then nothing. Cloud of smoke then back to the home screen. What a waste of money.

reviews.review_title: Sorry to say not worth the price
reviews.review_description: Just not worth the price.  New at quest so now I will look at reviews before buying.  Audio glitch from th start that is very annoying and won't stop.  Some glitches where the hands get stuck in mid air and you have to lose progress and restart.  Some turning items you can't grab or will spin and difficult to stop.  I got through level 3 room where the fires are and went in basement.  Next time I tried the game, progress was lost, I redid the room with the fires and unlocked the door to the basement but it just boots me to the main screen.  Tried that 3 times and here I am now writing this review...

What was going on? Why? There is a reason for what happened?

The game would be ok if it where lomger and with a purpouse.

The puzzles are correct, albeit too easy, maybe it is a game for children, but they should indicate it somewhere.

What is with the walking sound that doesn’t let up. It’s so annoying. At first I thought glitch, uninstalled, re installed and it was still there. No where to turn it off. 
Otherwise, from the time I spent in there it appeared to be a fair puzzle game.

I love escape rooms, but I should have read reviews before purchasing this one. Only 3 rooms is not worth purchasing. Also, a walking sound that never stops drove me crazy, so I had to play with no sound at all

I really enjoyed this one!  I hate scary things, but this wasn’t scary.  Some creepy vibes, but no big deal.  The height was an issue.  No matter what I did to the settings, I was too short in the rooms.  Made a few things challenging.  My bigger bummer was the end.  It just ends and cuts the story short.  There could have been so much more to this!

I was excited to try this escape room challenge. If I had known there were only three levels, I probably would not have purchased it. In fact, I am not sure how it happened, but I actually got the first two levels free. Got through the first two rooms (which I enjoyed for the most part - experienced some glitches in the second room which prevented me from moving forward even though I'd solved all the puzzles), and was then required to purchase the app to continue playing. If I'd known it was only for one more level, I would not have spent any money on it. 
Without giving anything away, I enjoyed solving the puzzles. Some of the sound effects got annoying. The final door and explanation was badly written/stupid.

I think this game has potential except for a few annoying features.  The game doesn’t have any “resume” feature. If one has to stop, restarting brings you back to the beginning. I made it through the first room and partially into the second room.  After pausing my headset, when I returned I was in the standing mode with no way to return to sitting. Restarting brought me back to the very beginning again. programmers are clever creating puzzles that aren’t overwhelming, but need to provide normal operability. After reading about the few rooms available, I also hope they can add additional adventures! Good Luck

reviews.review_title: Do not buy only three levels
reviews.review_description:
I would give it a zero if I could I can't believe I pay 7.99 and there's only three levels. I thought there'd be more once you unlocked it.
I enjoyed the game it was just 3 levels,

Played the trial, loved it. Bought the game, and ended quickly.
Game only has 3 levels. Not worth the price. Should only be considered a free game when purchasing any other long lasting game this game company has. 

Will be doing my review checks before spending my hard earned money to games.

For a paid game, I was hoping it would last more than an hour or so. There are only 3 levels that you can figure out pretty easily. It feels like they should be the free trial before paying for a game, but it is in fact the actual game. 

The puzzles are great, the graphics, the interaction with objects and everything about the gameplay is awesome, I just wish there were more levels.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Currently, the game consists of only three rooms. We understand that this may feel short and understand your disappointment, but we hope you enjoyed the experience within those three rooms.

reviews.review_description: I wish I’d read the other reviews before purchasing.  Whilst it’s a good game and the puzzles are nicely challenging, it’s disappointing that there’s only three rooms and I had to turn the sound off it was so annoying.  Is it worth the money?  Only just!!
What a waste !!
I love a puzzle/who did it game but if id of known there was only 3 chapters I wouldn't of bothered to buy it. A wasted £7.99 for it to end abruptly!.
Was fun but needs to be more challenging and longer within more of a storyline.
I can only say having 3 rooms was not expected, is a great developed game and hope they can get more rooms builds.
Very disappointed that there was only a few levels. Game over in no time. Not worth the money
Can’t get out of the first room so deleted it

This game is a cross between two of my favorite games, The Room series and The Seventh Guest.  I really enjoyed it since I have been waiting for a new Room game to come out    My only complaint is the sound effects for the footsteps gets out of sync and can be annoying. And that it is too short.  Wish it was longer. Hope they add more chapters.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Currently, the game consists of only three rooms. We understand that this may feel short and understand your disappointment, but we hope you enjoyed the experience within those three rooms.

reviews.review_description: I just purchased this game the other day and made it through the first room. Wanna go into the next area? It appears that I am floating below a room and can't do anything.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear that you're experiencing a glitch after completing the first room. You might try exiting the game and then re-entering to see if that resolves the issue.
Could you please provide more details about what you mean by "floating below a room"? This information will help us understand the problem better. Additionally, we invite you to join our Discord server, where you can communicate directly with the developers. This way, they can assist you in resolving the issue more effectively. Your input is valuable to us!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game. It's a great story, and the graphics are pretty good. The only issue I have is that there are only 3 chapters that I completed in around an hour or so. Please add more chapters

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Currently, the game consists of only three rooms. We understand that this may feel short and understand your disappointment, but we hope you enjoyed the experience within those three rooms.

reviews.review_description: It's fun, but only has 4 rooms and was very disappointed with that.  Wish it had stated that in the beginning, or I would not have purchased it.

This game would be absolutely amazing, but it has so many glitches in it, I was unable to get past the second chapter. The audio is messed up and I had to play the game on mute, which isn’t helpful as you need it for some of the clues. When playing the game if you’re standing in a spot the game glitches and it will automatically move you when you don’t want to move. Sometimes the hands do not work when trying to pick up items or do task. Please please please fix. This would be amazing without the glitches and more chapters.

Thank you

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We're sorry to hear that you're encountering so many glitches. Your comments are valuable, and we have passed this information along to our development team.
We understand how frustrating this can be, and we are committed to improving the game. Thank you again for your input, and we hope to enhance your experience in future updates!

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE;- I give up. The same sound glitch KEEPS happening EVERY. SINGLE. TIME I try to play and give the game yet another chance. But now yet another issue: I can't complete the 1st Chapter! 
I beat this chapter with an S grade on my first try in the demo (which also didn't have the foot step sound bug at all), but in the full version I PAID MONEY FOR? It completely bugs out after I put the pictures up. I can't do anything,  an issue that wasn't present in the fu**ing demo!
So i give up on this unfinished trash developed by this sh*t shoveling studio.
I'm getting a refund. So if you're eyeing this game, even at a low sale price save your money and the trouble of getting a refund you will inevitably request.


OG:- This should've been an easy game to put together compared to most. But after a FULL YEAR of "Early Access", this studio "Suplife Games" ONCE AGAIN drop a half-assed, bug riddled, cheaply made game to NEVER actually finish no matter what negatives the reviewers have brought up. I can't even finish the first godda*n Chapter because after a minute and after me COMPLETELY restarting the game, the foot step sounds glitch out and WILL NOT STOP EVEN IF I DO! TWICE!! Even going to the main menu doesn't stop it.
It's more pathetic than the very distracting and obvious loop of the rain & wind noise that just COMPLETELY stops for a second, and then starts the loop again. This happens every 2 or 3 minutes...
It's also impossible for me to read half of the characters words that show up on screen because it moves with your fu***ng head, which doesn't work at all for my half blindness.

Given nearly every other review has people stating even more, if not worse, glitches as well as they  are apparently more frequentjust after Chapter 1 (even progress blocking ones), AND the fact that this entire game is demo length to begin with and no Add-ons (hell, they never even finish their games to begin with). I HIGHLY recommend to get a much better escape room game elsewhere. There's plenty.
One made by a COMPETENT development team that actually put effort and care into their project, rather than dropping a half finished game for a quick buck just to never touch it again. Letting it just die andcwaste buyer's money.

Avoid ALL games from this pathetic studio actually (Suplife Games), because nearly every crap title they constantly drop is this way. All cheap, and all bad while they drop 3 more new half-assed games instead of finishing/ fixing ANY of the MULTIPLE 'Early Access' games they dropped and abandoned over a year ago without even a single worthwhile update (like this game). They'll always waste your money...
The absolute worst studio I've come across yet...

I’m glad to see more escape room experiences being developed and I enjoyed this one. I encountered a glitch at the very end of chapter 3. I was stuck, so I found a walkthrough video on YouTube to figure out what I was missing, so I know what was supposed to happen. The final key didn’t come out of the model house, but I only missed about 15 seconds of additional gameplay after that step, so I was still pretty happy. Thank you and good luck to the developers!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're glad you were able to find a workaround, and we’ll definitely look into the issue with the final key not appearing. Your support means a lot to us, and we’re committed to improving the game. Thank you again, and we hope to bring you even more exciting content in the future! Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Spend money only for 3 rooms not worth it don't buy this game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We understand that this game is on the shorter side, with only three rooms, which may not meet everyone's expectations. However, we want to highlight that this is a smaller experience designed for quick gameplay. We have released more horror games —Horror EA and Horror Simulator that will offer larger and more immersive experiences if you wanna check them out.

reviews.review_description: Loved the game! Very atmospheric. Some puzzles were challenging but that added fun to it. Don’t get the negative reviews. I enjoyed it a lot.

I bought this game yesterday and would appreciate getting my money back.  It made me redo the first room after I purchased it. The clicking noises as if I were walking all the time made me have to turn the volume off and it ended after 3 rooms.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that your experience with the game did not meet your expectations. Your concerns are important to us, and we will take them into consideration for future updates. If you would like assistance with your purchase or any technical issues, please reach out to our support team in discord https://discord.gg/2G6Mb6UC3v. Thank you for sharing your thoughts, and we hope to improve your experience in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I'm stuck at the model of the house. No clue as to what to do. Ive spun the thing and i know that circle thing is a puzzle but theres nothing left to find. Ive moved plates and books around, and Im stuck so i put everything in the fire and went to bed. 
Also how to turn off motion blinders?

developer_response.body:
Hi there, some clue that may help: 
- There is a head statue in the entrance.
- Move to the dining room.
- Check the small house model.
I hope this helps you progress in the third puzzle! Wishing you success in your quest and a fun gaming experience!

reviews.review_title: Great concept but a bit anemic
reviews.review_description: Very short (only 3 levels) and unfinished. What happens to the coins you find? Could be really cool if they put some effort in.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Currently, the game consists of only three rooms, which is part of its design. We understand that this may feel short and understand your disappointment, but we hope you enjoyed the experience within those three rooms.

reviews.review_description: Can't wait for more rooms. I have enjoyed this a lot.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your enthusiasm! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the game and are looking forward to more rooms. Your support means a lot to us, and we can't wait to bring you even more exciting content in the future. Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed until the sound began to mess up and become unbearable to listen to right after I bought it. Didn’t have issue in the demo. Unable to play the game as sound is required.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're sorry to hear about the sound issues you experienced after purchasing the game. We understand how important sound is to the overall experience, and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention.
Rest assured, we have forwarded your concerns to our development team for further investigation. Your input is invaluable as we work to improve the game. Thank you for your support, and we hope to resolve this issue soon so you can enjoy the game fully!

reviews.review_description:
I really liked the game, great Puzzles and great atmosphere. Sometimes a little buggy but this was ok.
Only the abrupt Ending was a little bit strange,but I loved everything else.
I hope we will see more!
Great graphics, puzzles, theme, experience. Just WAY too short. Only 3 small rooms. Would have enjoyed many more hours of play.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback on “Escape Gone Man.” We are thrilled that you appreciated the graphics, puzzles, theme, and overall experience. We understand your concerns about the game’s length and the desire for more content; hearing that you would enjoy many more hours of play is encouraging for our development team.

We’d like to invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.gg/2G6Mb6UC3v)where you can directly connect with our development staff and get the latest updates on development progress. It’s also a great way to stay informed about any upcoming expansions or additional content that might give you those extra hours of gameplay you’re looking for.

Looking forward to welcoming you into our community!

reviews.review_description: Great game and fun puzzles but if I had known there were only 3 chapters I wouldn't have bothered. I felt like it was much too short for the price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We recognize that this game is relatively short, featuring only three rooms, which may not align with everyone's expectations. It's designed as a compact experience for quick gameplay.
However, we want to let you know that we have released additional horror titles, such as Horror EA and Horror Simulator, which offer larger and more immersive experiences. If you're looking for something more substantial, we encourage you to check them out!

reviews.review_description:
The interactions are incredible, if a bit glitchy from time to time (noticeably the second wooden doll wanted to clip through the desk in the bedroom); and I would have preferred a faster walking speed.  Yes, there is the teleport function, but that feels useless when you can walk around freely.  But the real problem is the story:  There is no payoff!

With the story build-up of a private detective investigate something, I expected more of an actual mystery.  You wake up in the house, no clue how you got there, solve some puzzles, then you're just... done!  No finding the bad guy, no reporting your evidence to the authorities, no rescuing victims, nothing!

You can beat the whole game in roughly a half-hour.

Not much replay value.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thank you for your detailed and thoughtful review. We truly appreciate the time you've taken to share your experience with our game.
We're glad to hear that you found the interactions incredible, despite some occasional glitches. Your feedback about the wooden doll clipping and the walking speed has been noted and will be passed on to our development team for consideration. While we don't have specific plans for content updates at this time, your feedback is invaluable and has been shared with our development team. It will be taken into account as we consider future projects and potential improvements to our existing games.
We appreciate your insights about replay value and story depth. These are aspects we continually strive to improve upon in our game design process. 
Thank you again for your support and for taking the time to provide such comprehensive feedback. It's through reviews like yours that we can better understand our players' experiences and expectations.

reviews.review_description: Very much enjoying this game. I’m a fan of escape room games and this one is interesting. It’s not super difficult. It’s still a bit buggy, so hopefully that will be worked out. 2 suggestions: a way to either turn the background music/sound down and also allow the pop up text to be stabilized. It’s hard to read when it moves when you turn your head. Otherwise, I’m enjoying this so much!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your feedback on "Escape Room:Gone Man" We truly appreciate your input and suggestions. Your recommendation holds great value to us, and we want you to know that we're actively considering it as we continue to enhance and refine the game
